input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.11.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.11.2
            TITLE: external items must meet one of the two conditions:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.11.2: External Items must meet one of the two conditions:
F.5.11.2 External Items must meet one of the two conditions: 
a. Be attached at a Hoop to Brace node or a fully Triangulated structural node without the 
ability to create a moment at the node  
b. When not attached at a node as described above, then: 
• Additional Structural bracing meeting F.3.2.1.o must be added to prevent bending 
loads  
• Additional calculations must be performed to show the member will not fail in 
bending or shear, even if unbraced

final_answer: rule F.5.11.2: External Items must meet one of the two conditions: F.5.11.2 External Items must meet one of the two conditions: a. Be attached at a Hoop to Brace node or a fully Triangulated structural node without the ability to create a moment at the node b. When not attached at a node as described above, then: • Additional Structural bracing meeting F.3.2.1.o must be added to prevent bending loads • Additional calculations must be performed to show the member will not fail in bending or shear, even if unbraced
